instructions: Inform the property in advance of your expected arrival time
Valid ID must be provided before or during check-in
Foreign nationals must provide details for FRRO registration
Staff will meet you and provide keys at the apartment
Building has biometric entrance and CCTV surveillance
All couriers/deliveries to be collected by guests at ground floor for security
check_in.key_location: Keys + key card handed over by on-site staff/security guard
check_in.check_in_type: Guard-assisted — mention your booking name to the security guard at the main gate. He verifies in the system and assists with check-in.

instructions: Turn off all appliances (AC, TV, lights, geyser)
Hand keys to the security guard downstairs (or leave in key pickup box if no one is present)
Drop us a message confirming checkout
Any breakage or loss of keys will attract additional charges

wifi.speed: 80-100 Mbps (working speed). No LAN/ethernet cable available — WiFi only.
wifi.note: No Netflix/OTT account provided. Use your own credentials. Previous guest logins may appear — just log out and use your own.

in_room: Smart TV (42-inch) — bring your own OTT credentials
King-size bed with Wakefit orthopedic mattress
on_call: Extra cooking pots — available on request

house_rules: Maximum 2 guests per apartment — strictly no extra persons or outside guests allowed
No parties or events — INR 5,000 fine for violations
No smoking indoors — INR 2,000 charge for smoke/burn damage; smoking allowed on terrace/balcony only
Room decorations require INR 5,000 refundable security deposit (refunded if property remains undamaged)
Keep TV volume low — other guests share the building
All deliveries/couriers must be collected by guests at ground floor
Jacuzzi water is warm (not hot) in winter — heated using 50L geyser
Carrying your own heater or heavy appliances will incur electricity charges on guest
Children of any age are welcome (Booking.com policy)

custom_faqs.question: What's the difference between The Executive Escape and Jacuzzi Terrace?
custom_faqs.answer: The Executive Escape is a 1BHK with separate living room, two 42-inch TVs, ergonomic workspace, and is ideal for professionals. The Jacuzzi Terrace is a studio with a private couple jacuzzi, 2 bathrooms, and is perfect for couples. Both have king beds with Wakefit orthopedic mattresses and fully equipped kitchens.

custom_faqs.question: Is there a jacuzzi?
custom_faqs.answer: Yes! The Luxe Studio Retreat (Jacuzzi Terrace room) has a private couple jacuzzi. Note: In winter, the water is warm (not hot) as it's heated using a 50-liter geyser.

custom_faqs.question: Can I use Netflix/Prime on the TV?
custom_faqs.answer: Yes, we have 42-inch Smart TVs. Please log in with your own OTT credentials (Netflix, Amazon Prime, Hotstar, etc.). We don't provide shared accounts.

custom_faqs.question: Is housekeeping provided?
custom_faqs.answer: Yes, daily housekeeping is available. We also have a resident manager on-property for any assistance you need.

custom_faqs.question: Do you provide a room heater in winter?
custom_faqs.answer: Yes, room heaters are available on a chargeable basis. Please note: bringing your own heater or heavy appliances will incur electricity charges on the guest.

custom_faqs.question: Is this suitable for couples?
custom_faqs.answer: Absolutely! The Jacuzzi Terrace room is especially popular with couples — it features a private jacuzzi, ambient lighting, and premium toiletries. Both rooms offer a comfortable, private, and secure experience.

custom_faqs.question: What kitchen items are available?
custom_faqs.answer: Full kitchen: induction cooktop, microwave, electric kettle, refrigerator, RO water purifier, and complete cutlery. Extra cooking pots and basic spices are provided on call.

custom_faqs.question: Is laundry available?
custom_faqs.answer: Yes, a washing machine and cloth stand/drying rack are available in the building for your convenience.

custom_faqs.question: Can I decorate for a birthday or anniversary?
custom_faqs.answer: Yes, but decorations require a refundable security deposit of INR 5,000. The deposit is fully refunded if walls, sheets, and everything remains in good condition after removal.

custom_faqs.question: Is the area walkable?
custom_faqs.answer: The road itself is not very walkable (as noted by guests), but an auto or cab ride to nearby restaurants and stores takes just 10-15 minutes. The Sector 42-43 Rapid Metro is 1 KM away. Effingut Microbrewery is down the road.

custom_faqs.question: How do I get groceries or food delivered?
custom_faqs.answer: Blinkit and Zomato deliver to the property. All deliveries must be collected by guests at the ground floor for security reasons.

custom_faqs.question: Is there an airport shuttle?
custom_faqs.answer: No airport shuttle service. IGI Airport is about 15 KM away (20 min drive). You can book an Uber/Ola cab.

custom_faqs.question: Can I charge my electric car?
custom_faqs.answer: Yes, electric car charging is available at INR 300 per day.

custom_faqs.question: Do you know the Netflix password? / Can I watch Netflix?
custom_faqs.answer: We don't provide a shared Netflix account. Please log in with your own OTT credentials (Netflix, Prime, Hotstar). If you see a previous guest's login, just log out and use your own. Some international accounts (e.g., Canadian Netflix) may need settings changed to work in India.

custom_faqs.question: I need laundry service — who can do wash, dry, iron?
custom_faqs.answer: We have a local laundry person who does pickup, wash, dry, and iron. Contact: 7982035385. Tell him you're staying at Zest.Living Sector 42. Rates vary — discuss directly with him.

custom_faqs.question: Can I get a cook / home-cooked meals?
custom_faqs.answer: We can help arrange a cook. You can also try ChefCart for on-demand chef service. For a personal cook, we need 2-3 days to arrange. During festival periods (like Holi), availability may be limited.

custom_faqs.question: Is there a gym nearby?
custom_faqs.answer: Yes! CultFit and 2-3 other gyms are within walking distance, right in front of our property.

custom_faqs.question: Can I check out late?
custom_faqs.answer: Late checkout is confirmed on the same day based on availability. During festivals or low-occupancy days, we often allow checkout until 3-4 PM. Just ask in advance.

custom_faqs.question: How do I turn on the jacuzzi?
custom_faqs.answer: Our staff will help you set it up. Just message us and we'll send someone to assist. The jacuzzi uses a 50L geyser, so water is warm (not very hot) in winter.

custom_faqs.question: I forgot my ID / only have digital ID — is that okay?
custom_faqs.answer: Yes, we accept DigiLocker IDs. Download the DigiLocker app and show your digital ID to the guard. Physical ID is preferred but DigiLocker works.

custom_faqs.question: Is there an ethernet/LAN cable for internet?
custom_faqs.answer: No, we only provide WiFi (80-100 Mbps). There's no LAN cable or landline connection available.

custom_faqs.question: What do I do at checkout? Do I need to clean?
custom_faqs.answer: No need to clean — our housekeeping team will handle everything. Just turn off all appliances, put trash in the dustbin, and hand keys to the security guard downstairs.

custom_faqs.question: Do you have a bigger apartment for longer stays?
custom_faqs.answer: Yes! We have a more spacious 1BHK at our Sector 55 location with a cook who makes home-cooked food. Great for stays of a month or longer. Ask us for details and pricing.

custom_faqs.question: Where is the bedroom light switch?
custom_faqs.answer: Light switches are located near the bedroom door entrance. If you can't find them, message us and we'll guide you or send staff.

custom_faqs.question: I booked Sector 42 but stayed at Sector 55 last time — are they different?
custom_faqs.answer: Yes, we have two locations: Sector 42 (582, main road) and Sector 55 (A1/32, Sushant Lok 2). Check your booking confirmation for the correct address. Both are on Golf Course Road but different buildings.
